query: How can I cancel my plan?
answer:
To cancel your plan, go to **Settings > Billing > Subscription** and click **'Cancel Subscription'**, then confirm your cancellation. Your account will stay active through the end of your current billing period, so you'll still have access until then.

If you're on an annual plan and purchased within the last 14 days, you may also be eligible for a refund — just reach out to billing@support.com. Let me know if you need any further help! 😊

query: What's the difference between the two paid plans for small teams?
answer:
Great question! The two paid plans are **Pro** and **Team**:

- **Pro** is designed for individual users and includes unlimited projects and API access.
- **Team** adds multi-user support (up to 25 members), shared workspaces, admin controls, and priority support.

If you're working with a small team, the **Team plan** would be the right fit since Pro is single-user only. Both plans come with a 14-day free trial and no credit card required!

query: I want to cancel my plan and also get a refund for this month
answer:
Great news — both of those are totally doable depending on your plan type! Here's what you need to know:

- **To cancel:** Head to **Settings > Billing > Subscription**, click **'Cancel Subscription'**, and confirm. Your account will stay active through the end of your current billing period.
- **For a refund:** Refunds are available within 14 days of purchase for **annual plans**. Unfortunately, **monthly plans are non-refundable**, though canceling will stop any future charges.

To request a refund (if you're on an annual plan), reach out to **billing@support.com** and they'll get you taken care of! 😊

query: Is my data encrypted and where is it stored?
answer:
Great questions! All your data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+ and at rest using AES-256 encryption — and Enterprise plans also support customer-managed encryption keys.

As for storage, your data is kept in U.S.-based AWS data centers by default. If you're on an Enterprise plan and need EU-based data residency for GDPR compliance, that can be requested as well.

query: What happens after my card gets declined?
answer:
Great question! If your card is declined, we'll automatically retry the charge after 3 days and send you an email notification each time. After 3 failed attempts, your account will be downgraded to the free tier until you resolve the payment.

To avoid any interruption, you can update your payment method anytime by going to **Settings > Billing > Payment Methods** and adding a new card.
notes: All key facts from KB002 present — bonus payment update tip from KB001 is accurate and helpful
